metadata.description: Statistical evaluation with McNemar tests, Wilson CIs, calibration, tier analysis, and trace export

phase0.note: Only 5 synthetic examples evaluated (insufficient for the Phase 0 gate per hypothesis requirements of 25 real SARA cases). No gold predicate annotations available for precision/recall.

hallucination.note: Both hallucination rates are 0.0; L3 abduction was not triggered. Fisher p=1.0 confirms no significant difference — this is a null result.

l2_analysis.note: L2 tier was vacuous — never triggered across all 500 examples.
